summary: Comprehensive frontend UI/UX polish testing for FacturePro P3 batch. All 10 test cases passed (100%). Verified: Login page with dark left panel, Dashboard with monochrome stat cards and lucide icons, Sidebar with 10 nav items using lucide-react icons (no emojis), Subscription page 'Actif' badge for exempt user, Expenses modal with optional employee field and drag & drop receipt zone, Quick action cards navigation, Logout functionality, and Registration flow.
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - used existing exempt user and registered new trial user for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX polish (P3 batch) fully tested. Key changes verified: 1) Sidebar uses lucide-react icons (LayoutDashboard, Users, Package, FileText, FilePen, UserCheck, Receipt, Download, Settings, Gem) - no emojis. 2) Sidebar is light (#fafafa) with right border instead of dark gradient. 3) Dashboard stat cards are white with borders instead of colored backgrounds. 4) Login page has dark left panel (#09090b) instead of green gradient. 5) IBM Plex Sans font loaded via Google Fonts. 6) QuickActionCard accepts lucide component as icon prop. All data-testid attributes working correctly.

registration_flow.trial_banner: PASS - Trial banner visible for new user

design_review.text_contrast: PASS - Dark text (#09090b) on light background
design_review.no_emojis: PASS - All 10 nav items use SVG icons, no emojis

ui_ux_polish_verified.sidebar_modernized: Light minimal design (#fafafa) with right border
ui_ux_polish_verified.dashboard_monochrome: White stat cards with borders, lucide icons
